title: How to Create a Client Pitch With AI — From Prompt to PDF in 15 Minutes
summary: A demonstration of Venngage AI's one-pager generator that produces client-ready marketing documents from prompts. The workflow covers content generation, design, editing, visuals, and PDF export in approximately 15 minutes.
writeup: This video demonstrates Venngage AI's one-pager generator, walking through the creation of a client-ready marketing document from a prompt to a finished PDF in roughly 15 minutes. The workflow covers content generation, design, editing, adding visuals, and exporting to PDF. It matters as a concrete look at how prompt-driven tools automate the document production pipeline. The key takeaway: a complete client pitch can move from prompt to export within a single short session.
